matrix_rows.description: Sales marks the customer as closed-won and submits the onboarding handoff form.

identified_risks.risk_name: Missing or unclear onboarding intake information
identified_risks.risk_description: Onboarding plans should not be finalized when intake fields, contract context, integration details, or handoff information are missing or unclear.

identified_risks.risk_name: Incomplete intake or handoff may lead to incorrect planning
identified_risks.risk_description: Missing or unclear handoff information can cause incorrect plans, missed dependencies, or premature customer communication.

identified_risks.risk_name: Sensitive data may enter model context
identified_risks.risk_description: Fields requiring redaction or blocked from model context must be controlled before LLM use.

controls.name: Validate source and intake records before finalization
controls.description: Workflow items cannot be finalized when required source, intake, or reference information is missing or conflicting.

controls.name: Validate intake and handoff completeness
controls.description: Missing or unclear intake information must be routed for clarification before planning or customer communication.

controls.name: Human approval before backlog creation
controls.description: Backlog items may be proposed by the agent, but real issue creation requires approval.

controls.name: Audit project-management write action
controls.description: Issue creation must be logged with approval reference and created issue URL.

matrix_rows.description: Customer operations reviews account details, contract notes, and implementation scope.

identified_risks.risk_name: Governed approval requirement may be bypassed
identified_risks.risk_description: Onboarding plans involving sensitive data, custom integrations, enterprise terms, customer-facing commitments, or supervisor review must not advance without approval.

identified_risks.risk_name: Implementation scope may change without approval
identified_risks.risk_description: Scope, enterprise terms, or custom implementation requirements must be reviewed before the onboarding plan is finalized.

identified_risks.risk_name: Sensitive data may enter model context
identified_risks.risk_description: Fields requiring redaction or blocked from model context must be controlled before LLM use.

controls.name: Human approval before governed decision
controls.description: Policy-defined approval decisions must be reviewed before the workflow item advances.

controls.name: Audit log for governed decision
controls.description: Approval decisions must be logged with run ID, actor, timestamp, and rationale.

controls.name: Human review before implementation scope change
controls.description: Implementation scope, custom integration, or enterprise-term changes require approval before finalization.

controls.name: Audit implementation scope decision
controls.description: Scope-related decisions must be traceable to reviewer, rationale, and source evidence.

controls.name: Human approval before backlog creation
controls.description: Backlog items may be proposed by the agent, but real issue creation requires approval.

controls.name: Audit project-management write action
controls.description: Issue creation must be logged with approval reference and created issue URL.
